typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		TargetVersion as string,
		solutionstatus as string,
		APPResponsibleDate as timestamp,
		ConsequenceModelEscalationDate as timestamp,
		Rating as string,
		Title as string,
		INSTANCES as integer,
		ResponsibleParty as string,
		App_WFGUID as string,
		FirstDetected as timestamp,
		STATUS as string,
		FeedType as string,
		SolutionGroup as string,
		ValidatedDate as timestamp,
		SN_CIO as string,
		DueDate as timestamp,
		Server_WFGUID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT SN_CIO, 	   Server_WFGUID, 	   App_WFGUID, 	   COUNT(COMBID) INSTANCES, 	   ResponsibleParty, 	   [STATUS], 	   a.FeedType, 	   FirstDetected, 	   ConsequenceModelEscalationDate, 	   DueDate, 	   APPResponsibleDate, 	   TargetVersion, 	   ValidatedDate,                       Rating, solutionstatus,                        Title,                       SolutionGroup  	    	       FROM [cooiTracker2].[dbo].[vSORFeedsPrimary] (NOLOCK) a   where CAST(validateddate AS DATE) BETWEEN cast(getdate()-395  as date ) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) or validateddate is null       GROUP BY  	   SN_CIO, 	   Server_WFGUID, 	   App_WFGUID, 	   ResponsibleParty, 	   [STATUS], 	   a.FeedType, 	   FirstDetected, 	   ConsequenceModelEscalationDate, 	   DueDate, 	   APPResponsibleDate, 	   TargetVersion, 	   ValidatedDate,                       Rating,solutionstatus,Title,                       SolutionGroup',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> WFTiTracker
WFTiTracker sink(input(
		TargetVersion as string,
		SolutionStatus as string,
		APPResponsibleDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ConsequenceModelEscalationDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Rating as string,
		Title as string,
		INSTANCES as integer,
		ResponsibleParty as string,
		App_WFGUID as string,
		FirstDetected as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		STATUS as string,
		FeedType as string,
		SolutionGroup as string,
		ValidatedDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		SN_CIO as string,
		DueDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Server_WFGUID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		TargetVersion,
		SolutionStatus = solutionstatus,
		APPResponsibleDate,
		ConsequenceModelEscalationDate,
		Rating,
		Title,
		INSTANCES,
		ResponsibleParty,
		App_WFGUID,
		FirstDetected,
		STATUS,
		FeedType,
		SolutionGroup,
		ValidatedDate,
		SN_CIO,
		DueDate,
		Server_WFGUID)) ~> OLEDBDestination
